# Git Tools Functionality Test
# Tests all git tools with various git operations

# Build the git server binary
go build -o mcp-git-server .

# Create a test git repository with content
mkdir test_git_repo
cd test_git_repo
git init
git config user.name "Test User"
git config user.email "test@example.com"
echo "# Test Repo" > README.md
git add README.md
git commit -m "Initial commit"
echo "More content" >> README.md
echo "Another file" > file2.txt

# Test all git tools
exec ../mcp-git-server . <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{"roots":{"listChanged":true},"sampling":{}}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"git_status","arguments":{"repository":"."}},"id":3}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"git_log","arguments":{"repository":".","max_count":5}},"id":4}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"git_branches","arguments":{"repository":"."}},"id":5}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"git_diff","arguments":{"repository":"."}},"id":6}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"git_add","arguments":{"repository":".","files":["README.md","file2.txt"]}},"id":7}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"git_status","arguments":{"repository":"."}},"id":8}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"git_commit","arguments":{"repository":".","message":"Add more content and new file"}},"id":9}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"git_create_branch","arguments":{"repository":".","branch":"feature-branch"}},"id":10}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"git_branches","arguments":{"repository":"."}},"id":11}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"git_switch_branch","arguments":{"repository":".","branch":"main"}},"id":12}
EOF

# Verify git status shows modified files initially
stdout 'M README.md'
stdout '?? file2.txt'

# Verify git log shows commits
stdout 'Initial commit'

# Verify git branches shows main branch
stdout 'main'

# Verify git diff shows changes
stdout 'More content'

# Verify git add works
stdout 'Successfully added files'

# Verify status after add shows staged files
stdout 'M  README.md'
stdout 'A  file2.txt'

# Verify git commit works
stdout 'Add more content and new file'

# Verify branch creation
stdout 'feature-branch'

# Verify branches shows both branches
stdout 'feature-branch'
stdout 'main'

# Verify branch switching
stdout 'main'

# Cleanup
cd ..
rm -rf test_git_repo
